g.text: Climate shifts the probability of developmental forms.

text.style: font-size: 8.4px; font-family: 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #62666d

g.text: Many climate dimensions are associated with where fires fall in VASE space, but they do not determine a single pathway.

path.style: fill: #ffffff; opacity: 0.96; stroke: #3b78b6; stroke-linejoin: miter

g.text: Takeaway: climate redistributes fires across developmental possibilities.
